statement: Reset agent context between iterations of a multi-task loop. A fresh, bounded prompt per task prevents context overflow, reduces hallucinations, and keeps the agent focused. Stateless-but-iterative design (pick task, implement, validate, commit, reset) is the foundation of reliable autonomous agent work.

evidenceRefs.title: Cursor team guidance on periodic fresh starts

publicSummary: Reset context each iteration in multi-task agent loops to prevent drift and hallucinations.
cautionNotes: Applies to autonomous loops; interactive single-session use may benefit from preserved context.
